name: ZeroNote
description: All your notes, passwords, bookmarks, and 2FA in one secure, offline-first app
compose:
name: slashnode-zeronote
services:
  app:
    image: ghcr.io/besoeasy/zeronote:1.0.12
    container_name: zeronote
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8000:8000
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
